acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Runtime SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The Runtime team is responsible for the development and maintenance of OS system Runtime in openeuler community.. The SIG has 5 core members and maintains 39 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler Runtime SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler Runtime SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler Runtime SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Runtime SIG maintains 39 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/Runtime.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler Runtime SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler Runtime SIG has 2 Maintainers, including: Yongqiang Li, Senlin Xia. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
